mapper.select: SELECT QUSTNR_TMPLAT_IMAGE_INFO QUSTNR_TMPLAT_IMAGE_INFOPATHNM FROM TB_QUSTNR_TMPLAT WHERE 1=1 AND QUSTNR_TMPLAT_ID = #{qestnrTmplatId}

SELECT QUSTNR_TMPLAT_ID qestnrTmplatId, QUSTNR_TMPLAT_TY qestnrTmplatTy, TO_CHAR(FRST_REGIST_PNTTM,'YYYY-MM-DD') as FRST_REGIST_PNTTM, FRST_REGISTER_ID, TO_CHAR(LAST_UPDT_PNTTM,'YYYY-MM-DD') as LAST_UPDT_PNTTM, LAST_UPDUSR_ID, QUSTNR_TMPLAT_IMAGE_INFO qestnrTmplatImagepathnm, QUSTNR_TMPLAT_DC qestnrTmplatCn, QUSTNR_TMPLAT_PATH_NM qestnrTmplatCours FROM TB_QUSTNR_TMPLAT WHERE 1=1 AND QUSTNR_TMPLAT_ID = #{qestnrTmplatId}

SELECT A.QUSTNR_TMPLAT_ID qestnrTmplatId, A.QUSTNR_TMPLAT_TY qestnrTmplatTy, TO_CHAR(A.FRST_REGIST_PNTTM,'YYYY-MM-DD') as FRST_REGIST_PNTTM, (SELECT USER_NM FROM VW_USER_MASTER WHERE ESNTL_ID = A.FRST_REGISTER_ID) FRST_REGISTER_NM, A.FRST_REGISTER_ID, TO_CHAR(A.LAST_UPDT_PNTTM,'YYYY-MM-DD') as LAST_UPDT_PNTTM, A.LAST_UPDUSR_ID, A.QUSTNR_TMPLAT_IMAGE_INFO qestnrTmplatImagepathnm, A.QUSTNR_TMPLAT_DC qestnrTmplatCn, A.QUSTNR_TMPLAT_PATH_NM qestnrTmplatCours FROM TB_QUSTNR_TMPLAT A WHERE 1=1
AND QUSTNR_TMPLAT_DC LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}), '%')
AND QUSTNR_TMPLAT_TY LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}), '%')
ORDER BY A.FRST_REGIST_PNTTM DESC LIMIT #{recordCountPerPage} OFFSET #{firstIndex}

SELECT COUNT(*) totcnt FROM TB_QUSTNR_TMPLAT WHERE 1=1
AND QUSTNR_TMPLAT_DC LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}), '%')
AND QUSTNR_TMPLAT_TY LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}), '%')
